THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT CARLE, LISA SKYE RECOVER FROM APPELLANT MANUEL, DAVID $6,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $198.00 INTEREST, $194.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,892.00, S.F. RENT CONTROL ORDINANCE 37.3(C) FORBIDS SUBLEASE CHARGE EXCEEDING LEASE CHARGE. DEPOSIT MAY NOT BE WITHHELD EXCEPT BY CAUSE. CROSS-CLAIM JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF DAVID MANUEL AND AGAINST LISA SKYE CARLE, IN THE AMOUNT OF $590.04, $110.00 COSTS, FOR TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $700.04. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF SEP-13-2013. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
